Brand._note: Brand parent is live. Children below were re-created in Task 12 — the original Phase-0 Brand sub-pages (BRAND, Foundations, Decisions, Examples, Components) were in Notion's trash when Task 12 ran. New UUIDs replace the trashed ones (live as of 2026-04-27, post Task 12).

Project._note: All 11 child pages created in Task 13 (2026-04-27). 7 A6 DEFAULT skeletons + 4 yesid.dev-specific pages. Source: docs/project/.

_notes.brand_extra_children: Brand has 5 children (BRAND, Foundations, Decisions, Examples, Components). Plan expected 3 (Foundations, Decisions, Examples). BRAND and Components are extra pages created during Phase 0.
_notes.project_children: Task 13 created all 11 child pages (2026-04-27): 7 A6 DEFAULT skeletons (README, STACK, BINDINGS, ARCHITECTURE, TESTS, CONSTITUTION, VOCAB) + 4 yesid.dev-specific (SERVICES, PATTERNS, CSS, MOTION). UUIDs now in manifest.
_notes.non_a6_project_pages: Task 13 added 4 non-A6 yesid.dev-specific pages: SERVICES, PATTERNS, CSS, MOTION. UUIDs recorded in _non_a6_children block.
_notes.db_uuid_source: Pre-known (operator-supplied) — not re-discovered. Confirmed: Specs DB collection UUID e23c55c2 matches data-source-url seen in Private/Specs fetch.
_notes.private_databases_note: Private/ also contains 3 inline databases (Slices, Conversations, Sessions) visible in the page content but their container pages are the DB pages themselves, not separate child pages.
